name: Apprentice Knight-Iona
short_description: Take up the mantle of an Apprentice Knight Iona in this Action-RPG game on her quest to be part of the Brave Hero’s Party. Failing the knighthood examination, you must now train with your master to prove yourself worthy.
detailed_description:
Take up the mantle of an Apprentice Knight Iona in this Action-RPG game on her quest to be part of the Brave Hero’s Party. Failing the knighthood examination, you must now train with your master to prove yourself worthy.

Will you make it through the ordeal and become the great adventurer you’re meant to be?
Follow Iona’s steps as she ascends from humble beginning towards the path of a legend!
about_the_game:
Take up the mantle of an Apprentice Knight Iona in this Action-RPG game on her quest to be part of the Brave Hero’s Party. Failing the knighthood examination, you must now train with your master to prove yourself worthy.

Will you make it through the ordeal and become the great adventurer you’re meant to be?
Follow Iona’s steps as she ascends from humble beginning towards the path of a legend!
